findings.title: Security Checkpoint Error
findings.description: The page displays a security checkpoint error, indicating a failure to verify the browser. This suggests an issue with the verification process or the server's ability to handle requests.
findings.fix_prompt: Investigate and resolve server-side issues causing the 429 status code and implement proper error handling for security checkpoints.

findings.title: Console Errors
findings.description: Console errors indicate a failed resource load with a 429 status code, suggesting server overload or rate limiting issues.
findings.fix_prompt: Identify and address server-side rate limiting or overload issues to prevent 429 status code errors.

findings.title: Lack of User Guidance
findings.description: The page lacks clear guidance or next steps for users encountering the security checkpoint error, leading to a poor user experience.
findings.fix_prompt: Add clear instructions or support links for users encountering the security checkpoint error to improve user experience.

findings.title: Insufficient Text Contrast
findings.description: The text on the page may have insufficient contrast with the background, potentially affecting readability for some users.
findings.fix_prompt: Ensure text meets accessibility contrast standards (WCAG 2.1) to improve readability for all users.

final.summary: The page encounters a security checkpoint error with a 429 status code, indicating server-side issues. Improvements are needed in error handling, user guidance, and accessibility.
final.bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://getping.store and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [CRITICAL] Security Checkpoint Error
   Fix: Investigate and resolve server-side issues causing the 429 status code and implement proper error handling for security checkpoints.

2. [HIGH] Console Errors
   Fix: Identify and address server-side rate limiting or overload issues to prevent 429 status code errors.

3. [MEDIUM] Lack of User Guidance
   Fix: Add clear instructions or support links for users encountering the security checkpoint error to improve user experience.

4. [LOW] Insufficient Text Contrast
   Fix: Ensure text meets accessibility contrast standards (WCAG 2.1) to improve readability for all users.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

findings.title: Failed network requests
findings.description: There are 6 failed network requests for image files, which may impact page performance and user experience.
findings.fix_prompt: Investigate and fix the failed network requests by checking the URLs and ensuring the images are properly hosted and accessible.

findings.title: Missing alt text for images
findings.description: Some images on the page are missing alt text, which can impact accessibility and SEO.
findings.fix_prompt: Add alt text to all images on the page to improve accessibility and SEO.

findings.title: Inconsistent spacing
findings.description: There are some inconsistencies in spacing between elements on the page, which can impact visual appeal.
findings.fix_prompt: Review and adjust the spacing between elements to ensure a consistent design.

final.summary: The website has some minor issues with failed network requests, missing alt text, and inconsistent spacing, but overall it appears to be functional and visually appealing.
final.bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://www.reorconsulting.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [LOW] Failed network requests
   Fix: Investigate and fix the failed network requests by checking the URLs and ensuring the images are properly hosted and accessible.

2. [MEDIUM] Missing alt text for images
   Fix: Add alt text to all images on the page to improve accessibility and SEO.

3. [LOW] Inconsistent spacing
   Fix: Review and adjust the spacing between elements to ensure a consistent design.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.
